channel.title: Caf Enterprise Scale on Larry James Henry
channel.description: Recent content in Caf Enterprise Scale on Larry James Henry

item.title: Azure Platform Engineering: The Complete Guide to Building an Enterprise Landing Zone
item.description: Your Azure bill arrives and one line item is $47,000. Nobody on your team knows which subscription it came from. You trace it back to a developer who spun up a GPU cluster three weeks ago “just to test something.” There was no policy to stop them. There was no budget alert configured. There was no shared networking — they punched a hole through the firewall themselves. That subscription is a silo. You have fourteen more just like it.
